name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, delays in processing causes late claim resolutions. We compile and submit claims summaries instead of manual compilation of claims summaries.
problem_solved: delays in processing workers' compensation claims
